policyMetadata.noncomplianceMessage: DRCP control 'drcp-adf-02 - Disable public network inbound access for Self-Hosted Integration Runtimes'. For remediation, see https://confluence.office01.internalcorp.net:8453/display/DRCPKB/Incident+remediation+Data+Factory#IncidentremediationDataFactory#drcp-adf-02 .

policyDefinition.displayName: APG DRCP Data Factory cannot use public network access
policyDefinition.description: This policy prevents public network access to Azure Data Factory resources.

drcp.name: DataFactoryPublicNetworkAccessMustbeDisabled
drcp.controlDesc: Disable public network inbound access for Self-Hosted Integration Runtimes

metadata.description: Effect of this Azure Policy - Audit, Deny or Disabled.
